messages.author: Folkert
messages.text: I wrote a simple IRC to MeshCore bridge. It works to ways. It uses a tcp connection to a repeater to exchange messages. https://github.com/folkertvanheusden/irc-to-meshcore
messages.content_html: I wrote a simple IRC to MeshCore bridge. It works to ways. It uses a tcp connection to a repeater to exchange messages. https://github.com/folkertvanheusden/irc-to-meshcore
